36d40fd9b81cac1e.translation: Sprite Foundryは、ローカル環境でのみ動作するアセット生成パイプラインで、8方向のピクセルスプライトを生成、レビューし、ノーマルマップと深度マップとともにエクスポートします。生成にはComfyUI、ライフサイクル管理にはSQLite、レンダリング検証にはGodot 4.6を使用し、これらはすべて単一のCLIから制御されます。
36d40fd9b81cac1e.source: Sprite Foundry is a local-only asset pipeline that generates, reviews, and exports 8-direction pixel sprites with normal and depth maps. It drives ComfyUI for generation, SQLite for lifecycle tracking, and Godot 4.6 for finish-lab lighting verification — all controlled from a single CLI.

- 8方向：正面、左正面、左、左背面、背面、右背面、右、右正面
- 48x48ピクセルの透過PNG、中心下を原点

- 8 directions: front, front_left, left, back_left, back, back_right, right, front_right

- NVIDIA GPU推奨 (RTX 5080 / 16 GB VRAMで検証済み)

- [ComfyUI](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI) running locally (for generation)

- NVIDIA GPU recommended (RTX 5080 / 16 GB VRAM tested)

c08ae6093df2d88e.translation: Sprite Foundryは、**ローカル開発ツール**です。以下の機能はありません。
c08ae6093df2d88e.source: Sprite Foundry is a **local developer tool**. It does not:

cdc3a8968b9a47b1.translation:
- ネットワークへのアクセス (ComfyUIはlocalhostで動作)
- シークレット、トークン、または認証情報の処理
- テレメトリーの収集または送信
- 自身の作業ディレクトリ以外の場所に書き込み
cdc3a8968b9a47b1.source:
- Access the network (ComfyUI runs on localhost)
- Handle secrets, tokens, or credentials
- Collect or send telemetry
- Write outside its own working directory

7bdf861e2ebdeb7b.translation: ファイル操作は、`exports/`、`bakeoff/`、`boards/`、`derived/`、およびSQLiteレジストリに限定されます。サブプロセス呼び出しは、ComfyUIのローカルAPIとGodotのヘッドレスレンダリングに限定されます。
7bdf861e2ebdeb7b.source: File operations are constrained to `exports/`, `bakeoff/`, `boards/`, `derived/`, and the SQLite registry. Subprocess calls are limited to ComfyUI's local API and Godot headless rendering.

debffefdc8415d99.translation: Sprite Foundry est un système de gestion de ressources local qui génère, examine et exporte des sprites pixelisés 8 directions avec des cartes de normales et de profondeur. Il utilise ComfyUI pour la génération, SQLite pour le suivi du cycle de vie et Godot 4.6 pour la vérification de l'éclairage via finish-lab, le tout contrôlé à partir d'une seule interface en ligne de commande.
debffefdc8415d99.source: Sprite Foundry is a local-only asset pipeline that generates, reviews, and exports 8-direction pixel sprites with normal and depth maps. It drives ComfyUI for generation, SQLite for lifecycle tracking, and Godot 4.6 for finish-lab lighting verification — all controlled from a single CLI.

a9e0a1c5908a4911.translation: Sprite Foundry est un **outil de développement local**. Il ne :
a9e0a1c5908a4911.source: Sprite Foundry is a **local developer tool**. It does not:

48ec224a60b706c0.translation:
- Accède au réseau (ComfyUI s'exécute sur localhost)
- Gère les secrets, les jetons ou les informations d'identification
- Collecte ou envoie des données télémétriques
- Écrit en dehors de son propre répertoire de travail
48ec224a60b706c0.source:
- Access the network (ComfyUI runs on localhost)
- Handle secrets, tokens, or credentials
- Collect or send telemetry
- Write outside its own working directory

8ba0a447c9b9a18c.translation: Les opérations de fichiers sont limitées à `exports/`, `bakeoff/`, `boards/`, `derived/` et le registre SQLite. Les appels de sous-processus sont limités à l'API locale de ComfyUI et au rendu headless de Godot.
8ba0a447c9b9a18c.source: File operations are constrained to `exports/`, `bakeoff/`, `boards/`, `derived/`, and the SQLite registry. Subprocess calls are limited to ComfyUI's local API and Godot headless rendering.

79045088b09bb799.translation: स्प्राइट फाउंड्री एक स्थानीय स्तर पर चलने वाला टूल है जो 8 दिशाओं वाले पिक्सेल स्प्राइट (छवियां) बनाता है, उनकी समीक्षा करता है और उन्हें निर्यात करता है। इसमें सामान्य (normal) और गहराई (depth) मानचित्र भी शामिल होते हैं। यह ComfyUI का उपयोग करके छवियों का निर्माण करता है, SQLite का उपयोग करके उनके जीवनचक्र को ट्रैक करता है, और Godot 4.6 का उपयोग करके "फिनिश-लैब" लाइटिंग की जांच करता है - और ये सभी एक ही कमांड-लाइन इंटरफेस (CLI) से नियंत्रित होते हैं।
79045088b09bb799.source: Sprite Foundry is a local-only asset pipeline that generates, reviews, and exports 8-direction pixel sprites with normal and depth maps. It drives ComfyUI for generation, SQLite for lifecycle tracking, and Godot 4.6 for finish-lab lighting verification — all controlled from a single CLI.

d1345f787a018af5.translation: 20 उत्पादन इकाइयां, निर्यात के लिए तैयार, और कोई भी अनुबंध उल्लंघन नहीं:
d1345f787a018af5.source: 20 production export packs, zero contract violations:

- उपयोगकर्ता डेटा लोड करने से पहले `schema_version: "1.0.0"` की पुष्टि करते हैं।

c40ad8a717e7fc8f.source: Sprite Foundry is a **local developer tool**. It does not:

d800285bb131b733.translation:
- नेटवर्क से कनेक्ट करें (कॉम्फीयूआई लोकलहोस्ट पर चलता है)।
- गोपनीय जानकारी, टोकन या क्रेडेंशियल्स का प्रबंधन करें।
- टेलीमेट्री डेटा एकत्र करें या भेजें।
- अपने कार्यशील डायरेक्टरी के बाहर फ़ाइलें लिखें।
d800285bb131b733.source:
- Access the network (ComfyUI runs on localhost)
- Handle secrets, tokens, or credentials
- Collect or send telemetry
- Write outside its own working directory

0f65d5c89eb8d282.translation: फ़ाइल संचालन केवल `exports/`, `bakeoff/`, `boards/`, `derived/` और SQLite रजिस्ट्री तक ही सीमित हैं। सबप्रोसेस कॉल केवल ComfyUI के स्थानीय एपीआई और Godot के हेडलेस रेंडरिंग तक ही सीमित हैं।
0f65d5c89eb8d282.source: File operations are constrained to `exports/`, `bakeoff/`, `boards/`, `derived/`, and the SQLite registry. Subprocess calls are limited to ComfyUI's local API and Godot headless rendering.

c814e66f880359e5.translation: Sprite Foundry é um sistema de gerenciamento de recursos que opera localmente e que gera, revisa e exporta sprites de pixels em 8 direções, com mapas de normal e profundidade. Ele utiliza o ComfyUI para geração, o SQLite para rastreamento do ciclo de vida e o Godot 4.6 para verificação de iluminação (finish-lab), tudo controlado a partir de uma única interface de linha de comando (CLI).
c814e66f880359e5.source: Sprite Foundry is a local-only asset pipeline that generates, reviews, and exports 8-direction pixel sprites with normal and depth maps. It drives ComfyUI for generation, SQLite for lifecycle tracking, and Godot 4.6 for finish-lab lighting verification — all controlled from a single CLI.

dd47600966214b5e.translation: 20 pacotes de exportação de produção, sem violações de contrato:
dd47600966214b5e.source: 20 production export packs, zero contract violations:

- GPU NVIDIA recomendada (RTX 5080 / 16 GB de VRAM testados)

- [ComfyUI](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI) running locally (for generation)
- Godot 4.6 (for finish lab rendering)
- NVIDIA GPU recommended (RTX 5080 / 16 GB VRAM tested)

1d0189394ba3a887.translation: O Sprite Foundry é uma **ferramenta para desenvolvedores que opera localmente**. Ele não:
1d0189394ba3a887.source: Sprite Foundry is a **local developer tool**. It does not:

8ff5788706cd9bb9.translation:
- Acessa a rede (o ComfyUI é executado no localhost)
- Lida com segredos, tokens ou credenciais
- Coleta ou envia dados de telemetria
- Escreve fora de seu próprio diretório de trabalho
8ff5788706cd9bb9.source:
- Access the network (ComfyUI runs on localhost)
- Handle secrets, tokens, or credentials
- Collect or send telemetry
- Write outside its own working directory

0afa1d3f0a662365.translation: As operações de arquivo são restritas aos diretórios `exports/`, `bakeoff/`, `boards/`, `derived/` e ao registro SQLite. As chamadas de subprocessos são limitadas à API local do ComfyUI e à renderização headless do Godot.
0afa1d3f0a662365.source: File operations are constrained to `exports/`, `bakeoff/`, `boards/`, `derived/`, and the SQLite registry. Subprocess calls are limited to ComfyUI's local API and Godot headless rendering.

626f8c13b9a03002.translation: Sprite Foundry 是一个本地资源流水线，用于生成、审查和导出 8 个方向的像素精灵图，并带有法线和深度贴图。它使用 ComfyUI 进行图像生成，利用 ControlNet 技术进行身体姿态控制（8 种身体类型），使用 SQLite 跟踪生命周期，并使用 Godot 4.6 进行 finish-lab 渲染验证，所有操作都通过单个命令行界面进行控制。
626f8c13b9a03002.source: Sprite Foundry is a local-only asset pipeline that generates, reviews, and exports 8-direction pixel sprites with normal and depth maps. It drives ComfyUI for generation with ControlNet morphology control (8 body classes), SQLite for lifecycle tracking, and Godot 4.6 for finish-lab lighting verification — all controlled from a single CLI.

67dec04fe89b27c0.translation: 共有 92 个生产导出包，分布在 12 个类别中：

624093b4c905e3d2.translation: 钟楼守卫、骨骼编织者、机械傀儡、咧嘴偶像、蜂巢守护者、空洞骑士、墨水幽灵、灯笼钓鱼者、镜像潜伏者、泥土复生者、鼠王、根系傀儡、孢子之母、牙齿收集者、喉咙吟唱者、飞龙

7ff7bc079c7d4ff4.translation: 紧凑型巡逻官、维沙之家使节
7ff7bc079c7d4ff4.source: Compact Patrol Officer, Veshan House Envoy

6e93841d641d3496.translation: 非人形生物使用特定于身体类型的 ControlNet 深度引导，而不是标准的人形骨骼。每个身体类型都有其自己的深度参考轮廓、ControlNet 强度和时间参数。
6e93841d641d3496.source: Non-humanoid creatures use body-class-specific ControlNet depth guides instead of the standard humanoid skeleton. Each body class has its own depth reference silhouette, ControlNet strength, and timing parameters.

5f3e986c8adcea75.translation: 鼠王、孢子之母、泥土复生者
5f3e986c8adcea75.source: Rat King, Spore Mother, Mud Revenant

dfd24c83f7d87dd7.translation: 深度引导是无关节的原始图形（块状、柱状、圆柱状），它们锁定质量和方向，而不会规定骨骼或肢体的放置。角色配置中的 `body_class` 字段会自动选择正确的预设：
dfd24c83f7d87dd7.source: Depth guides are joint-free primitives (blobs, pillars, columns) that lock in mass and orientation without dictating skeleton or limb placement. The `body_class` field in character configs auto-selects the correct preset:

72dba75c11e8e9ab.translation:
- 8 个方向：正面、正面左侧、左侧、背面左侧、背面、背面右侧、右侧、正面右侧
- 48x48 透明 PNG，中心底部作为旋转中心
- 消费者在加载之前验证 `schema_version: "1.0.0"`
72dba75c11e8e9ab.source:
- 8 directions: front, front_left, left, back_left, back, back_right, right, front_right
- 48×48 transparent PNG, center_bottom pivot
- Consumers validate `schema_version: "1.0.0"` before loading

- 推荐使用 NVIDIA GPU（已测试 RTX 5080 / 16 GB VRAM）

2910da16a282812e.translation: Sprite Foundry 是一个**本地开发工具**。它不：
2910da16a282812e.source: Sprite Foundry is a **local developer tool**. It does not:

3a702634a0e24d03.translation:
- 访问网络（ComfyUI 在本地运行）。
- 处理密钥、令牌或凭据。
- 收集或发送遥测数据。
- 在其自身的工作目录之外写入文件。
3a702634a0e24d03.source:
- Access the network (ComfyUI runs on localhost)
- Handle secrets, tokens, or credentials
- Collect or send telemetry
- Write outside its own working directory

1e87b60c158bbd93.translation: 文件操作仅限于 `exports/`、`bakeoff/`、`boards/`、`derived/` 以及 SQLite 注册表。子进程调用仅限于 ComfyUI 的本地 API 和 Godot 的无头渲染。
1e87b60c158bbd93.source: File operations are constrained to `exports/`, `bakeoff/`, `boards/`, `derived/`, and the SQLite registry. Subprocess calls are limited to ComfyUI's local API and Godot headless rendering.

dc1cb960c52199c4.translation: Sprite Foundry es una herramienta que genera, revisa y exporta sprites de píxeles de 8 direcciones, con mapas de normales y de profundidad, y que funciona solo en el entorno local. Utiliza ComfyUI para la generación, con ControlNet para el control de la morfología (8 clases de cuerpos), SQLite para el seguimiento del ciclo de vida, y Godot 4.6 para la verificación de la iluminación (finish-lab), todo controlado desde una única interfaz de línea de comandos (CLI).
dc1cb960c52199c4.source: Sprite Foundry is a local-only asset pipeline that generates, reviews, and exports 8-direction pixel sprites with normal and depth maps. It drives ComfyUI for generation with ControlNet morphology control (8 body classes), SQLite for lifecycle tracking, and Godot 4.6 for finish-lab lighting verification — all controlled from a single CLI.

58201cec3a1c3019.translation: 92 paquetes de exportación para la producción, distribuidos en 12 categorías:

a55e3a3bb52c23e4.translation: Las criaturas no humanoides utilizan guías de profundidad específicas para cada clase de cuerpo, en lugar del esqueleto humanoide estándar. Cada clase de cuerpo tiene su propia silueta de referencia de profundidad, fuerza de ControlNet y parámetros de sincronización.
a55e3a3bb52c23e4.source: Non-humanoid creatures use body-class-specific ControlNet depth guides instead of the standard humanoid skeleton. Each body class has its own depth reference silhouette, ControlNet strength, and timing parameters.

93d6ef344b3cbd4a.translation: Rat King, Spore Mother, Mud Revenant
93d6ef344b3cbd4a.source: Rat King, Spore Mother, Mud Revenant

8f1d50b6551b29de.translation: Las guías de profundidad son primitivos sin articulaciones (blobs, pilares, columnas) que fijan la masa y la orientación sin determinar la ubicación del esqueleto o las extremidades. El campo `body_class` en las configuraciones de los personajes selecciona automáticamente la configuración correcta:
8f1d50b6551b29de.source: Depth guides are joint-free primitives (blobs, pillars, columns) that lock in mass and orientation without dictating skeleton or limb placement. The `body_class` field in character configs auto-selects the correct preset:

c6cb3e670e9bbbd8.translation:
- 8 direcciones: frontal, frontal izquierdo, izquierdo, trasero izquierdo, trasero, trasero derecho, derecho, frontal derecho
- PNG transparente de 48x48, punto de pivote en la parte inferior central
- Los consumidores validan `schema_version: "1.0.0"` antes de la carga
c6cb3e670e9bbbd8.source:
- 8 directions: front, front_left, left, back_left, back, back_right, right, front_right
- 48×48 transparent PNG, center_bottom pivot
- Consumers validate `schema_version: "1.0.0"` before loading

- Godot 4.6 (para la renderización de finish lab)
- GPU NVIDIA recomendada (RTX 5080 / 16 GB de VRAM probados)

c67a3b788f0913d8.source: Record an individual attempt within a run

58a560ac338566fa.translation: Muestra la cola de revisión para una ejecución.
58a560ac338566fa.source: Display review queue for a run

ecfda999ccf47144.translation: Acepta un intento en la etapa de revisión actual.
ecfda999ccf47144.source: Accept an attempt at current review stage

ae307baadda3b475.translation: Rechazar un intento con un código de rechazo.
ae307baadda3b475.source: Reject an attempt with a reject code

c90a38a23c65d6b2.translation: Aceptar todos los intentos pendientes en una ejecución.
c90a38a23c65d6b2.source: Accept all pending attempts in a run

82c3be5d8de52f0c.translation: Rechazar todos los intentos pendientes en una ejecución con un solo código.
82c3be5d8de52f0c.source: Reject all pending in a run with one code

eac7159b5f3f1c88.translation: Regenerar la cola para los intentos rechazados.

d376b0889279f214.translation: Mostrar el ciclo de vida completo de un intento.
d376b0889279f214.source: Show full lifecycle for one attempt

9c64b0f8d2d7d245.translation: Generar un panel de comparación de resultados finales.

66a011562374a639.translation: Narrativa completa del origen de un elemento.
66a011562374a639.source: Full provenance narrative for a subject

e73caf9d8e382db9.translation: Cadena de regeneración para un intento.

aa700f49832d276d.translation: Análisis de patrones de fallos y tasas de éxito.
aa700f49832d276d.source: Failure pattern analysis and pass rates

fbd37c49b1f517e5.translation: Métricas de rendimiento (por ejecución o a nivel de toda la plataforma).

1e26fb754899495e.translation: Un comando: mapas y capturas de resultados finales para una ejecución aceptada.
1e26fb754899495e.source: One-command: maps + finish captures for an accepted run

ca4b80e3a0df4b6a.translation: Exportar una ejecución con resultados finales aceptados como un paquete de recursos determinista.
ca4b80e3a0df4b6a.source: Export a finish-accepted run as a deterministic asset pack

06d1fad9bbedefe6.translation: Sprite Foundry es una **herramienta de desarrollo local**. No:
06d1fad9bbedefe6.source: Sprite Foundry is a **local developer tool**. It does not:

b7357d9da122f6ed.translation:
- Accede a la red (ComfyUI se ejecuta en localhost).
- Maneja secretos, tokens o credenciales.
- Recopila o envía datos de telemetría.
- Escribe fuera de su propio directorio de trabajo.
b7357d9da122f6ed.source:
- Access the network (ComfyUI runs on localhost)
- Handle secrets, tokens, or credentials
- Collect or send telemetry
- Write outside its own working directory

c8f750a76e08d6d5.translation: Las operaciones con archivos están restringidas a `exports/`, `bakeoff/`, `boards/`, `derived/` y el registro SQLite. Las llamadas a subprocesos están limitadas a la API local de ComfyUI y la renderización sin interfaz de Godot.
c8f750a76e08d6d5.source: File operations are constrained to `exports/`, `bakeoff/`, `boards/`, `derived/`, and the SQLite registry. Subprocess calls are limited to ComfyUI's local API and Godot headless rendering.

fe0e9a886beae60b.translation: स्प्राइट फाउंड्री एक स्थानीय स्तर पर चलने वाला टूल है जो 8 दिशाओं वाले पिक्सेल स्प्राइट (छवियां) बनाता है, उनकी समीक्षा करता है और उन्हें निर्यात करता है। इसमें सामान्य (normal) और गहराई (depth) मानचित्र भी शामिल होते हैं। यह ComfyUI को कंट्रोलनेट मॉर्फोलॉजी नियंत्रण (8 शरीर के प्रकार) के साथ छवियों को बनाने के लिए चलाता है, SQLite का उपयोग जीवनचक्र को ट्रैक करने के लिए करता है, और Godot 4.6 का उपयोग फिनिश-लैब लाइटिंग सत्यापन के लिए करता है - और ये सभी एक ही कमांड-लाइन इंटरफेस (CLI) से नियंत्रित होते हैं।
fe0e9a886beae60b.source: Sprite Foundry is a local-only asset pipeline that generates, reviews, and exports 8-direction pixel sprites with normal and depth maps. It drives ComfyUI for generation with ControlNet morphology control (8 body classes), SQLite for lifecycle tracking, and Godot 4.6 for finish-lab lighting verification — all controlled from a single CLI.

af0357f25569dec9.translation: 12 लेन में, कुल 92 उत्पादन पैकेज निर्यात के लिए तैयार हैं।

a0b1c49b25f6686b.translation: बेल वार्डन, बोन वीवर, क्लॉक गोलेम, मुस्कुराता हुआ मूर्ति, हाइव कीपर, होलो नाइट, इंक शेड, लैंटर्न एंग्लर, मिरर स्टॉकर, मड रिवेन्ट, रैट किंग, रूट पपेट, स्पोर मदर, दांतों का संग्रहकर्ता, थ्रोट सिंगर, वाइवरन।
a0b1c49b25f6686b.source: Bell Warden, Bone Weaver, Clock Golem, Grinning Idol, Hive Keeper, Hollow Knight, Ink Shade, Lantern Angler, Mirror Stalker, Mud Revenant, Rat King, Root Puppet, Spore Mother, Teeth Collector, Throat Singer, Wyvern

509329ce739da51b.translation: बारटेंडर, भिखारी, लोहार, बच्चा, बुजुर्ग, किसान, मछुआरा, रक्षक, जड़ी-बूटी विशेषज्ञ, सराय का मालिक, दीपक जलाने वाला, व्यापारी, गायक, कुलीन व्यक्ति, लेखक, अस्तबल का कर्मचारी।
509329ce739da51b.source: Barmaid, Beggar, Blacksmith, Child, Elder, Farmer, Fisherman, Guard, Herbalist, Innkeeper, Lamplighter, Merchant, Minstrel, Noble, Scribe, Stable Hand

07b3cb3ac02fba62.translation: आर्चर (धनुर्धर), बॉम्बर (विस्फोटक), ब्रूट (शक्तिशाली योद्धा), ग्रंट (सामान्य सैनिक), स्काउट (जासूस), शमन (जादुई चिकित्सक), वॉरचीफ (सेनापति), वुल्फ राइडर (भेड़िया सवार)।
07b3cb3ac02fba62.source: Archer, Bomber, Brute, Grunt, Scout, Shaman, Warchief, Wolf Rider

516973e3934e2dad.translation: बर्बेरियन, क्लैरिक, फाइटर, मेज, मंक, पलाडिन, रेंजर, रोग।
516973e3934e2dad.source: Barbarian, Cleric, Fighter, Mage, Monk, Paladin, Ranger, Rogue

2ab4df18dcc8756a.translation: कप्तान, डाकू, डूब गया, गवर्नर, नौसेना सैनिक, बंदूकधारी, रसद अधिकारी, समुद्री पुजारी।
2ab4df18dcc8756a.source: Captain, Cutthroat, Drowned, Governor, Navy Sailor, Pistoleer, Quartermaster, Sea Priest

198ef15d2b946d17.translation: असासिन, ब्लैकगार्ड, पंथ का पुजारी, अंधेरा साधु, ड्रेड रेंजर, नेक्रोमेंसर, रीवर, योद्धा सरदार।
198ef15d2b946d17.source: Assassin, Blackguard, Cult Priest, Dark Monk, Dread Ranger, Necromancer, Reaver, Warlord

373eaada5bb3df59.translation: ब्लूटर, एलीट, हैज़मेट, दंगा, धावक, लड़खड़ाने वाला, कंकालीय, श्रमिक.
373eaada5bb3df59.source: Bloater, Elite, Hazmat, Riot, Runner, Shambler, Skeletal, Worker

1efdd31fed5df985.translation: गैर-मानव जैसे जीवों में, मानक मानव कंकाल की जगह, शरीर के प्रकार के अनुसार विशिष्ट कंट्रोलनेट डेप्थ गाइड का उपयोग किया जाता है। प्रत्येक शरीर के प्रकार के लिए, एक अलग डेप्थ संदर्भ सिल्हूट, कंट्रोलनेट की शक्ति और समय संबंधी पैरामीटर निर्धारित होते हैं।
1efdd31fed5df985.source: Non-humanoid creatures use body-class-specific ControlNet depth guides instead of the standard humanoid skeleton. Each body class has its own depth reference silhouette, ControlNet strength, and timing parameters.

924e1258aedc8543.translation: रैट किंग, स्पोर मदर, मड रीवेनंट।
924e1258aedc8543.source: Rat King, Spore Mother, Mud Revenant

3e744931d420dd0c.translation: "डेप्थ गाइड्स" ऐसे बुनियादी तत्व (जैसे कि उभार, खंभे, या स्तंभ) होते हैं जो बिना किसी जोड़ के होते हैं और जो आकार और दिशा को स्थिर रखते हैं, लेकिन वे शरीर की संरचना या अंगों की स्थिति को निर्धारित नहीं करते हैं। कैरेक्टर कॉन्फ़िगरेशन में "बॉडी क्लास" फ़ील्ड स्वचालित रूप से सही प्रीसेट का चयन करता है।"
3e744931d420dd0c.source: Depth guides are joint-free primitives (blobs, pillars, columns) that lock in mass and orientation without dictating skeleton or limb placement. The `body_class` field in character configs auto-selects the correct preset:

f471eab2a5426d93.translation: Sprite Foundry é um sistema de gerenciamento de recursos local que gera, revisa e exporta sprites de pixels em 8 direções, com mapas de normal e profundidade. Ele utiliza o ComfyUI para geração, com controle de morfologia via ControlNet (8 classes de corpos), SQLite para rastreamento do ciclo de vida e Godot 4.6 para verificação de iluminação (finish-lab) — tudo controlado a partir de uma única interface de linha de comando (CLI).
f471eab2a5426d93.source: Sprite Foundry is a local-only asset pipeline that generates, reviews, and exports 8-direction pixel sprites with normal and depth maps. It drives ComfyUI for generation with ControlNet morphology control (8 body classes), SQLite for lifecycle tracking, and Godot 4.6 for finish-lab lighting verification — all controlled from a single CLI.

1f947dbc3417f068.translation: 92 pacotes de exportação para produção, divididos em 12 categorias:

3cb8537424ed6c89.translation: Bell Warden, Bone Weaver, Clock Golem, Grinning Idol, Hive Keeper, Hollow Knight, Ink Shade, Lantern Angler, Mirror Stalker, Mud Revenant, Rat King, Root Puppet, Spore Mother, Teeth Collector, Throat Singer, Wyvern

7a23f5a01df5f5e0.translation: Criaturas não humanoides utilizam guias de profundidade específicos para cada classe de corpo, em vez do esqueleto humanoide padrão. Cada classe de corpo possui seu próprio perfil de referência de profundidade, intensidade do ControlNet e parâmetros de tempo.
7a23f5a01df5f5e0.source: Non-humanoid creatures use body-class-specific ControlNet depth guides instead of the standard humanoid skeleton. Each body class has its own depth reference silhouette, ControlNet strength, and timing parameters.

385907036be47904.translation: Rat King, Spore Mother, Mud Revenant

c9fcf6d1c98af0ee.translation: Os guias de profundidade são primitivos sem articulações (massas, pilares, colunas) que definem a massa e a orientação, sem determinar o posicionamento do esqueleto ou dos membros. O campo `body_class` nas configurações dos personagens seleciona automaticamente a configuração correta:
c9fcf6d1c98af0ee.source: Depth guides are joint-free primitives (blobs, pillars, columns) that lock in mass and orientation without dictating skeleton or limb placement. The `body_class` field in character configs auto-selects the correct preset:
